parameters.content:
## Telegram User-API fetch (Telethon)

Runner prerequisites:
- telethon installed on the Python task runner
- env vars: TELEGRAM_API_ID, TELEGRAM_API_HASH, TELEGRAM_SESSION (StringSession from one-time login)
- optional: MAX_FILE_MB (default 50) - larger media is skipped (attachmentSkipped=true)

Inputs: channel, sinceMessageId (min_id, dedupe), limit (<=100/call), dateFrom, dateTo.
Albums: one item per media message, grouped via groupedId.
Stateless: parent owns sinceMessageId and re-invokes for backfill.
